title: hedeoma multiflora
intro: Hedeoma multiflora, also known as many-flowered pennyroyal, is a perennial herb native to North America, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is known for its health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and easing respiratory problems. Hedeoma multiflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in traditional medicine and aromatherapy.
